scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:client: wait-on http-get://localhost:3001/api/health && npm run dev --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
